query: SELECT c.id, c.claimNumber, c.status, c.documentProcessingStatus, c.aiAssessmentTriggered, c.aiAssessmentCompleted, c.sourceDocumentId, c.vehicleMake, c.vehicleModel, c.vehicleRegistration FROM claims c WHERE c.id = 2130345 LIMIT 1
